targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM investigations WHERE started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM investigation_learnings WHERE deprecated = false
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM investigation_embeddings) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM investigations WHERE outcome IN ('resolved','escalated','failed')), 0), 1) AS pct

SELECT date_trunc('hour', started_at) AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'resolved') AS resolved, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'escalated') AS escalated, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'failed') AS failed FROM investigations WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, COUNT(*) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) AS learnings, SUM(CASE WHEN learning_type = 'solution' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) AS solutions FROM investigation_learnings WHERE deprecated = false AND $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sweep_reports sr, jsonb_array_elements(sr.findings) AS f WHERE sr.id = (SELECT id FROM sweep_reports ORDER BY swept_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND COALESCE(f->>'status', 'open') NOT IN ('resolved', 'false_positive')
SELECT severity FROM sweep_reports ORDER BY swept_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) as sweep_count FROM sweep_reports WHERE swept_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM swept_at) * 1000 as swept_at FROM sweep_reports ORDER BY swept_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT sr.id AS report_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER () - 1 AS finding_idx, f->>'severity' AS severity, f->>'finding' AS finding, COALESCE(f->>'status', 'open') AS status, COALESCE(f->>'remediation', '') AS remediation, COALESCE(f->>'resolution', '') AS resolution FROM sweep_reports sr, jsonb_array_elements(sr.findings) AS f WHERE sr.id = (SELECT id FROM sweep_reports ORDER BY swept_at DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY CASE f->>'severity' WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'warning' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END

SELECT swept_at AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f->>'severity' = 'critical') AS critical, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f->>'severity' = 'warning') AS warning, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f->>'severity' = 'info') AS info FROM sweep_reports sr, jsonb_array_elements(sr.findings) AS f WHERE $__timeFilter(swept_at) GROUP BY swept_at ORDER BY swept_at
